title_zh: 如何捕捉自然的雨景光影
title_en: Capturing Natural Light in the Rain
excerpt_zh: 雨天不代表不能拍照，反而能創造出極具氛圍感的作品...
excerpt_en: Rainy days don't mean you can't shoot; they create unique moods...

title_zh: 南投山林間的婚紗紀實
excerpt_zh: 這次我們走進霧氣繚繞的山林，用鏡頭記錄最真誠的誓言...
excerpt_en: Stepping into the misty forest to record authentic vows...
